member.name: M:BBPRewiredCompat.RewiredPlusManager.CreateNewInput(System.String,System.String,BBPRewiredCompat.RewiredPlusManager.InputBehaviorID,BBPRewiredCompat.RewiredPlusManager.InputMapCategory,UnityEngine.KeyCode,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a brand new button Rewired input.
member.param: The object-like name of this input
The localization-like name of this input

The behavior ID for this input
Already defined ids are 0 (default) and 1 (snap, which all base game inputs uses)
The category ID for this input
The default input for this key
The default input id for this joystick input
The default input id for this mouse input

member.summary: Creates a brand new axis Rewired input.
member.param: The object-like name of this input
The localization-like name of this input

The behavior ID for this input
Already defined ids are 0 (default) and 1 (snap, which all base game inputs uses)
The category ID for this input

The default inputs for this key
As in order: PosX, NegX, PosY, NegY

The default inputs id for this joystick input
As in order: PosX, NegX, PosY, NegY

The default inputs id for this mouse input
As in order: PosX, NegX, PosY, NegY

member.name: M:BBPRewiredCompat.RewiredPlusManager.GetInputID(System.String)
member.summary: Grabs the input ID for this custom input

member.name: M:BBPRewiredCompat.RewiredPlusManager.CreateNewCategory(System.String,System.String,BBPRewiredCompat.RewiredPlusManager.InputMapPage)
member.summary: Creates a brand new category to an existing Rewired Mapper Page
member.param: The object-like name of this category
The localization-like name of this category
The existing page where this mapping category goes to
